2.Open sdcard/games/mods folder.
3.Copy Flintlock Pistol_1 and paste it in the behavior_packs folder in /games/com.mojang/
Copy Flintlock Pistol_2 and paste it in the resource_packs folder in /games/com.mojang/
4.Create new world in game and apply new resource and behavior pack.

The flintlock pistol is an old weapon which was first introduced in the 17th century but has since then (in the real world) been replaced by cartridge-systems and other modern technologies. This mod adds a flintlock pistol to the game. It actually replaces the snowball but with an added attack damage and new textures.

Creator: Ed24, Twitter Account

How to find the weapon?
The flintlock pistol cannot be crafted. The only way to find it is by going to a snow biome and shovel some snow. By this method you will be able to find lots of flintlock guns. Each pistol has one use so use with care.

Most mobs can be killed by the use of one bullet.
